GroupCreationAskChatIDInstructions:
✅ Name saved: {{ .f1 }}

Enter the Telegram group chat ID to link to this group.

💡 How to get chat ID:
1. Add @userinfobot to your group chat
2. It will send the chat ID (e.g.: -1001234567890)
3. Copy and send that ID here
GroupCreationErrorInvalidChatIDHelp: ❌ Invalid chat ID format. Enter numeric ID (e.g.: -1001234567890):
GroupCreationAskIsForum: 🗂 Is this group a forum (supergroup with topics)?
GroupCreationAskThreadIDInstructions:
📍 Enter forum topic ID:

To find topic ID:
1. Open topic in Telegram web version (web.telegram.org)
2. URL will be like: https://web.telegram.org/k/#-1001234567890_123
3. Number after '_' is the topic ID (in example: 123)

Or send 0 to skip (events will go to main chat):
GroupCreationErrorInvalidTopicID: ❌ Invalid topic ID format. Enter a number (e.g.: 123) or 0 to skip:
GroupCreationSuccessTopicRegistered: ✨ Forum topic registered! Events will be sent to this topic.

BotAddedForumInstructions:
📋 How to register a forum:
1. Go to the desired forum topic
2. Send /create_group command directly in the topic
3. The bot will automatically detect the topic ID!

✨ The bot will automatically configure the group to work with this topic.
All events will be sent to the selected topic.
BotAddedUserForumInstructions:
🗂 Type: Forum

📋 To register the forum:
1. Go to the desired forum topic
2. Send /create_group directly in the topic
3. The bot will automatically detect the topic ID!

✨ All events will be sent to the selected topic.
